'''ngathugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadnet|roadnet]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-th-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadnet|roadnet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngathugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæthigith|ngæthigith]] || [[word:ngæthigij|ngæthigij]] || [[word:ngæthigish|ngæthigish]] || [[word:ngæthigi|ngæthigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngathuthuguth|ngathuthuguth]] || [[word:ngathuthuguj|ngathuthuguj]] || [[word:ngathuthugush|ngathuthugush]] || [[word:ngathuthugu|ngathuthugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngathuguth|ngathuguth]] || [[word:ngathuguj|ngathuguj]] || [[word:ngathugush|ngathugush]] || [[word:ngathugu|ngathugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngathufguth|ngathufguth]] || [[word:ngathufguj|ngathufguj]] || [[word:ngathufgush|ngathufgush]] || [[word:ngathufguf|ngathufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngathuguthu|ngathuguthu]] || [[word:ngathuguju|ngathuguju]] || [[word:ngathugushu|ngathugushu]] || [[word:ngathuguku|ngathuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngathuguth|ngathuguth]] || [[word:ngathuguj|ngathuguj]] || [[word:ngathugush|ngathugush]] || [[word:ngathugu|ngathugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngathuguthul|ngathuguthul]] || [[word:ngathugujul|ngathugujul]] || [[word:ngathugushul|ngathugushul]] || [[word:ngathugukul|ngathugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngathuguthuthu|ngathuguthuthu]] || [[word:ngathugujuju|ngathugujuju]] || [[word:ngathugushushu|ngathugushushu]] || [[word:ngathuguku|ngathuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngathuguthun|ngathuguthun]] || [[word:ngathugujun|ngathugujun]] || [[word:ngathugushun|ngathugushun]] || [[word:ngathugukun|ngathugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngathuguthuoro|ngathuguthuoro]] || [[word:ngathugujuoro|ngathugujuoro]] || [[word:ngathugushuoro|ngathugushuoro]] || [[word:ngathugukuoro|ngathugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
